reviews.comment:
Muy lindo y cómodo. No pidan pollo con verduras porque es de hospital.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice and comfortable. Don't order chicken with vegetables because it's hospital-grade.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlM0pTTUpREAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños limpios y provistos con papel. Tienen un toma afuera para cargar el celular. Muy bueno eso.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are clean and stocked with toilet paper. They also have an outlet outside for charging cell phones. That's great.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlbk5LVTl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para hacer una parada tiene árboles y bancos donde tomar algo

(Translated by Google)
Good place to stop, it has trees and benches where you can have a drink
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlN0lQdl93RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para estirar las piernas y un café antes de seguir viaje.
Además se puede comer y hay un camping y una parrilla

(Translated by Google)
A good place to stretch your legs and have a coffee before continuing your journey. You can also eat there, and there's a campsite and a grill.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlektLTlpREAE

reviews.comment:
Estación normal,con bune ubicacion, los precios caros a comparación de otra ypf.,. Pero buen lugar si necesitas parar.,
Cuenta también con un comercio al lado para comer,

(Translated by Google)
A standard gas station in a good location, though prices are higher compared to other YPF stations. It's a good place to stop if you need to. There's also a shop next door where you can eat.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURldEpMakxREAE

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para descansar ya que tiene mucho verde ideal para tomar algo al aire libre en esta época del año

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to rest since it has a lot of greenery, ideal for having something to drink outdoors at this time of year.
